examples: Stallman said it should take only a couple of months.
Stallman, who prefers to be called rms, got his start hacking at MIT.
To that end, Richard Stallman, a programmer at MIT, founded the GNU Project in 1984.
Certainly Richard Stallman did not envision this when he created the paradigm of Free Software.
Stallman can be an infuriating man, but he can also be a very charming lunch companion.
